description: This screen is a mobile app interface for calculating the waist-to-height ratio. The layout is organized from top to bottom, with a green app bar at the top displaying the title "Waist to Height Ratio" and an information icon on the right. Below the app bar, there are two sections for inputting age and height, with options for centimeters and kilograms or inches and pounds. The input fields are accompanied by icons and units. Below the input fields, there is a "RESULT" section with placeholder text for the waist-to-height ratio and ideal waist. The next section lists the waist-to-height ratio categories: Underweight, Normal, Overweight, Obese, and Morbidly Obese. At the bottom, there is an advertisement banner. The screen is designed with a clean, minimalistic interface, using a light green background for the app bar and white text for the input fields and results. The typography is consistent, with a sans-serif font and a size range of 16-24sp. The background system uses solid colors and gradients, with a white card on a light grey background for the input fields. The app is designed to be accessible, with a high contrast ratio for text and a clear hierarchy of information. The primary CTA is the "RESULT" section, which is likely to display the calculated waist-to-height ratio. The main navigation pattern is vertical, with the app bar at the top and the input fields and results below. The dominant colors are light green, white, and grey.
